details.test: Task 1: Enroll in cheapest weekday evening Beginner Salsa class starting next month
Task 2: Register a 7-year-old for earliest suitable class and schedule
Task 3: Purchase cheapest 8+ class multi pass under $150 with pay-at-studio
Task 4: Book free trial Hip Hop on next available Saturday between 10:00 and 14:00
Task 5: Schedule 60-minute private Contemporary lesson with experienced instructor
Task 6: Create weekly schedule of up to three evening classes at Downtown and add to favorites
Task 7: Ask question about adult drop-in cancellation policy via contact form
Task 8: Register for earliest July weekend workshop >=2 hours under $60
Task 9: Buy $100 digital gift card (email, send now) with pay-at-studio
